channel.title: Learning on My Linux Journey
channel.description: Recent content in Learning on My Linux Journey

item.title: Alpine Linux Learning Plan - 6 Week Mastery Guide
item.author: youcef7770@gmail.com (Youcef)
item.description: A structured 6-week learning plan to become an Alpine Linux specialist. Covers installation, APK, networking, diskless mode, Docker, and advanced topics.

item.title: Best Database Books - Learning Resources
item.author: youcef7770@gmail.com (Youcef)
item.description: Curated list of best books for learning databases. Covers SQL, relational algebra, database design, and practical guides for beginners to experts.
